# Engineering Onboarding

## Week one

- Get hardware set up: laptop provisioned, VPN profile installed, SSH
  keys in the IdP.
- Get access to GitHub, the monorepo, Grafana, Sentry, PagerDuty.
- Read the architecture overview and the ADRs in this repo.
- Pair with a buddy on a small bug fix. Target a merged PR by Friday.

## Week two

- Clone the monorepo. Follow `cmd/<service>/README.md` to run at least
  two services locally.
- Complete the platform-go tutorial in `docs/platform-go-tutorial.md`.
- Attend the weekly architecture review meeting as an observer.

## Month one

- Join your team's on-call rotation as a shadow.
- Ship a small feature end to end: design doc, review, deploy, monitor.
- Work through the incident response runbook in a mock drill.

## Key references

- Architecture overview: `docs/architecture-overview.md`
- Deployment guide: `docs/deployment.md`
- Incident response: `runbooks/incident-response.md`
- Troubleshooting: `docs/troubleshooting.md`

## Who to ask

- Codebase questions: your team's tech lead.
- Platform questions: `#platform` Slack channel.
- On-call escalation: `#incidents` Slack channel.
